name: @dream-horizon-org/daisdlc
description: AI Software Development Lifecycle — Cursor rules, agents, and skills delivered via CLI

scripts.sync-templates: rm -rf templates/cursor/agents templates/cursor/rules templates/cursor/skills templates/cursor/commands && cp -r .cursor/agents .cursor/rules .cursor/skills .cursor/commands templates/cursor/
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run sync-templates && npm run clean && npm run build
